{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113354705C566CF1C0AAE775F6D"}"},"total":4985},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7551640541593371416","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这书别的都中规中矩，优点或者说独具一格的是女主塑造的特别好，虽然男主一直被她控制拿捏“凌辱”，但是一点不惹人讨厌，反而特别有乐子。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758256963,"group_id":"7503984033022364734","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N32uEp8usFN7BTN9MCUtDULKuYP/iA6r1m0NQSNfnNOW","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1117578793069088","user_name":"用户名54366922"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1117578793069088","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7503984033022364734","book_info":{"abstract":"【恶劣坏女人】+【恋爱软饭】+【杀伐果断】+【武道升级】+【战斗爽！】
“公主，听说临溪寺很灵验，您真不许个愿望吗？”
“许愿？它该跟本宫许愿。”
“说的也是，可是公主来都来了。”
“……”
“那就送个驸马给本宫玩吧。”
“要听话乖巧，还要痴迷本宫的身体，痴迷到会跪在地上亲脚的程度。”
“公主您说的不是驸马，是狗。”
“那就在加上聪明、机灵、英武、有野心识时务……”
“嗯，先那么多，以后本宫再补充。”
玩笑般说完这些。
安乐公主起驾回宫时，恍然看到临溪寺供奉的菩萨对她笑了一下。
————————————————————
刚大学毕业的杨安很是蛋疼。
好消息：他穿越了，开局就拿到十倍战力的外挂。
坏消息：当天就落到坏女人手里了。
好消息：坏女人有着天下第一的容貌，还是个公主。
坏消息：她过于恶劣！！！
————————————————————
冰天雪地里。
秦裹儿脚下，杨安满头大汗。
绝望的握着她那只比瓷器还要秀美的玉足！
即将踩碎他喉咙的玉足！
怎么破！
在线等！很着急！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2b9dfad491a2846768c420904ef6795d","author":"桃白白真的白","author_id":"","book_id":"7503984033022364734","book_name":"快跑，这个驸马是太岁！","book_short_name":"谁说这公主太恶劣，这公主可太好了","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#503020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"15.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7506527469667615294","read_count":"158898","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1277023"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"316","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,穿越,架空,开局,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/680d704dbbc8d83200258af00b194d6e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255347&x-signature=imPCbYwdxRDa8YCqsTky75OW56Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1450953795181155","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"97"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113354705C566CF1C0AAE775F6D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":131,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14338,"reply_count":19,"show_pv":147355},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7610435717276140312","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"后面一般般了，不好看了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771945135,"group_id":"7503984033022364734","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3609047883848680"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7503984033022364734","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"227"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"6","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":27837,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7570349103355249432","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"开头部分对话读起来会觉得有点唐，但到了后面作者在这一方面的度就把握的很好，很有打情骂俏的感觉了[害羞]
剧情设计也没有什么毒点，人物有血有肉，希望杨安，吴桐，林奴三人可以组成黄金铁三角，一个装逼，一个捧哏，一个面瘫来拆台，刚刚好[赞]
主角的天赋设计有点简单粗暴，但算不上什么问题。
目前来看应该是多女主，公主是正宫。这个就仁者见仁智者见智了，毕竟有人就是不喜欢看多女主，但我觉得无所谓╮(╯_╰)╭，再加上每个女主各有特色，人物刻画丰富，感情线与主角的成长相交织，张弛有度，恰恰推动了剧情发展，这一方面反而要加分[飞吻]
就是作者太短了，还欠着十几章没有还，匹夫爆更！
总而言之：[书架加一]","text_exts":[{"e":235,"s":233,"text":"张弛","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BC%A0%E5%BC%9B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774071347AE775F6D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227570349103355249432%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227503984033022364734%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%A0%E5%BC%9B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762610771,"group_id":"7503984033022364734","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx91t+3VpMxBH6C2VpVGvKu0MiWHSWmcDc+V1705V09O","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a3beed13d2524bbebc4d9516a4fba64a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617455&x-signature=5xqNqdP5aVawMHURz3cNcoWva2c%3D","user_id":"3609047883848680","user_name":"浊水无清"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3609047883848680","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7503984033022364734","book_info":{"abstract":"【恶劣坏女人】+【恋爱软饭】+【杀伐果断】+【武道升级】+【战斗爽！】
